message:
Grid cells shown individually, windows snap to grid on any move

Overlay: Each cell the window will cover is shown as a separate
outlined rectangle with rounded corners and margin, instead of one
big highlight rectangle.

Snapping: Windows now snap to the nearest grid cell on ANY grab-op-end
(move or resize), not just when using our drag overlay. This means
dragging a window normally also snaps it to the grid. The window is
resized to exactly fill its grid cells.
